title: Register and land in the role-based area
description: This test verifies that a new user can register with valid details and reach the authenticated area for the selected role.

steps.description: Navigate to /#register
Fill in the full name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the CPF field with a valid CPF
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Select a role
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the registration form
Verify the authenticated area for the selected role is opened
Verify the dashboard or role-specific home area is displayed

title: Log in and enter the dashboard
description: An existing user can log in with valid credentials and reach the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Log in and reach the correct role-based area
description: This test verifies that a valid login routes the user into the correct authenticated area for their role.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated area for the user role is opened
Verify the dashboard or role-specific home area is displayed

title: Register a new athlete account and enter the athlete area
description: This verifies that a new athlete can complete registration and is routed into the authenticated athlete area afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /#register
Fill in the full name field with a new athlete name
Fill in the email field with a unique email address
Fill in the CPF field with a valid CPF
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Select the athlete role
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the athlete dashboard
Verify authenticated athlete content is displayed

title: Register a new account and enter the correct area
description: A new user can register with valid details and lands in the authenticated area appropriate for the selected role.

steps.description: Navigate to /#register
Fill in the full name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the CPF field with a valid CPF
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Select an athlete role
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands in the authenticated area for the selected role

title: Block invalid registration data
description: This test verifies that submitting registration with invalid input shows validation errors and does not complete sign up.

steps.description: Navigate to /#register
Fill in the full name field with A
Fill in the email field with invalid-email
Fill in the CPF field with 123
Fill in the phone field with 1
Fill in the password field with 123
Submit the registration form
Verify registration validation errors are visible
Verify the authenticated area is not opened

title: Register a new responsible user and enter the responsible area
description: This verifies that a new responsible user can complete registration and is routed into the correct authenticated area afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /#register
Fill in the full name field with a new responsible user name
Fill in the email field with a unique email address
Fill in the CPF field with a valid CPF
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Select the responsible user role
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the responsible user area
Verify authenticated linked-athlete content is displayed

title: Protect authenticated pages before login
description: This test verifies that a visitor who opens an authenticated page is routed to login instead of seeing protected content.

steps.description: Navigate to /#dashboard
Verify the login page is displayed
Verify protected dashboard content is not displayed

title: Register a new business manager and enter the business area
description: This verifies that a new business manager can complete registration and is routed into the correct authenticated area afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /#register
Fill in the full name field with a new business manager name
Fill in the email field with a unique email address
Fill in the CPF field with a valid CPF
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Select the business manager role
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the business manager area
Verify authenticated linked-athlete content is displayed

title: Log in as an athlete and access the dashboard
description: This verifies that an athlete can sign in successfully and reach the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the athlete dashboard
Verify dashboard status content is displayed

title: Log in as an administrator and access the admin area
description: This verifies that an administrator can sign in successfully and reach the administrator area.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the administrator area
Verify admin dashboard content is displayed

title: Show a login error for invalid credentials
description: The login form rejects invalid credentials and shows an error without entering the app.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with invalid credentials
Fill in the password field with invalid credentials
Submit the login form
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Reserve an eligible future session
description: An athlete can reserve an eligible future session and see the reservation state update.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the trainings section
Open an eligible future session
Reserve the session
Verify the session reservation state is updated

title: Record a same-day attendance check-in
description: This test verifies that an athlete can complete a valid same-day QR check-in and see the attendance entry recorded afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the attendance section
Start QR code check-in
Scan a valid same-day session QR code
Verify an attendance record is displayed
Verify the monthly attendance history is updated

title: View athlete dashboard status details

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#dashboard
Verify active plan information is displayed
Verify monthly attendance, next session, and linked responsible user information are displayed

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard section

Verify monthly attendance and next session information are displayed

description: This verifies that an athlete can browse trainings and reserve a future eligible session end to end.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /#trainings
Select an eligible future training session

title: Review attendance history and totals
description: This test verifies that an athlete can open attendance history and review attendance totals, calendar, and prior records.

steps.description: Navigate to /#login

Submit the login form

title: Cancel an existing reservation
description: An athlete can cancel a previously booked session and see the reservation removed.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Cancel a reserved training session
description: This verifies that an athlete can cancel an existing reservation from the trainings area and see the session return to an unreserved state.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Scan a valid same-day QR code

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the attendance section
Start QR code check-in

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
